book-deletion.title: Are you sure you want to delete this book?
book-deletion.description: You are about to delete <bold>"{{bookName}}"</bold> from <bold>"{{bookshelfName}}"</bold>. This action cannot be undone.

restore-last-read.title: Restore Last Read Book on Startup
restore-last-read.description: If history is disabled, this setting will be ignored.

check-update-on-startup.title: Check for Updates on Startup
check-update-on-startup.description: Automatically check for a new version when the application starts.

first-page.title: Show the initial page in single-page view

loupe.title: Loupe Settings
loupe.description: Settings for the magnifier tool. Toggle it using the configured key or mouse button.
loupe.toggle-key-description: The keyboard key or mouse button used to toggle the loupe.
loupe.zoom-description: The magnification level of the loupe.
loupe.radius-description: The size of the loupe in pixels.

dir-watch.title: Watch a directory or file for changes
dir-watch.warn-message: Enabling this feature may cause high system load when accessing directories with a large volume of files.

feature-toggle.title: Reading History
feature-toggle.description: When enabled, reading history will be saved for each book you read.

preview.title: Show preview while loading
preview.description: Displays a low-resolution thumbnail until the full image is loaded.

max-image-height.title: Maximum image Height(px)
max-image-height.description:
Images taller than this will be resized proportionally.
Sets zero to disable resizing.
max-image-height.range-error-message: Please enter an integer of 0 or greater.
max-image-height.error-message: Failed to set max image height. Please check your input.

resize-method.title: Resizing Method
resize-method.description: Select the algorithm used for resizing. Choose the best balance between image quality and processing speed for your needs.

pdf.title: PDF Rendering Height(px)
pdf.description: Height of the PDF rendering area in pixels.
pdf.error-message: Failed to set PDF rendering height. Please check your input.

log-level.title: Log Level
log-level.description: A restart of the application is required to apply the log level settings.

experimental-features.title: Experimental Features
experimental-features.description: These features are currently under development. They may be changed or removed without notice, and functionality may be unstable.

third-party-licenses.title: Third-Party Licenses
third-party-licenses.body: This application is built with open source software.

updater.not-available: Your application is up to date.
updater.restart: The application will automatically restart to apply the update.
updater.checking-error:
An error occurred while checking for updates.
{{error}}
updater.unsupported-platform:
Auto-updater is not supported on this platform.
Please update using your package manager.
updater.installing-error:
An error occurred while installing the update.
{{error}}
updater.dialog-content:
A new version of RookReader ({{version}}) is available.
Would you like to download and install it now?
